task: TDD RED Phase - Write failing tests for consolidated session writer
summary: Created comprehensive failing test suite for consolidated session writer. All 22 tests fail with ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND because the implementation module does not exist yet - the correct TDD RED phase behavior.

tests: creates session file with correct v2 schema structure
creates comprehensive counters object initialized to zero
initializes empty turns events and diagnostics arrays
generates session file named ses_ISO-date_purpose_agent.json
appends turn to turns array and increments turnCount
increments userMessageCount when turn has userMessage
increments assistantOutputCount when turn has assistantContent
appends event to events array
enters event with correct turnNumber and timestamp
appends diagnostic to diagnostics array
accepts optional context field
increments specified counter by 1
increments by specified amount
changes session status
updates the updated timestamp
accepts active completed and abandoned values
sets parentSessionId on child session
appends to childSessionIds for multiple children
updates timestamps on both sessions
getSessionPath returns correct file path for session
loadSession reads and parses session JSON
session writes are idempotent for same sessionId

schema_v2_spec.purposeClass: discovery | brainstorming | research | planning | implementation | gatekeeping | tdd | course-correction

functions_to_implement: incrementCounter(sessionDir: string, sessionId: string, counter: CounterType, amount?: number): Promise<void>
updateStatus(sessionDir: string, sessionId: string, status: SessionStatus): Promise<void>
linkSubSession(sessionDir: string, parentId: string, childId: string): Promise<void>
